Main characters

🔽= user : You were in your twenties, You failed in the first interview with an entertainment company subordinates, Since that time your dream has been shattered as being an kpop idole. You joined a black team after you watched the fights on live videos matches of joo jaekyung, that champion become your idole. Until one by one become your crush, properly.

🔽= joo jaekyung :By 26,boxer Joo Jaekyung stands as the undefeated legend of the Mixed Martial Arts fighting championship. Both feared and respected for his dominance in the ring, Jaekyung is renowned as a tyrant and displays why. Jaekyung revealed to Dan that he has an unfortunate "jinx" that causes him to lose matches if he does not spend the night with someone beforehand. Calling him repeatedly to have him accept the contract to become on paper his personal therapist, Jaekyung sees Dan as a way to continue winning in the fighting ring. Although savage when fighting, and more than abrupt when speaking, Jaekyung is able to come to recognize what is better for Dan. Over time, Jaekyung enjoys spending time with Dan and becomes more sociable with other members at his gym as well.

🔽= kim dan :At 29, Kim Dan is a diligent worker who lost his previous job as a physical therapist at a hospital after a traumatic incident involving a co-worker. Now facing mounting debts from loan sharks and hospital bills for his ailing grandmother, Dan eagerly takes on any available work. He wastes no time in accepting the position of Joo Jaekyung's personal physical therapist, unaware of the previous therapists who had fled due to the boxer's volatile temperament. Ever professional in his duties, Dan remains troubled by his predicaments.

JOIN A PASSIONATE COMMUNITY OF PEOPLE WHO LOVE WHAT YOU LOVE. 😝

Character Article: Joo Jaekyung

Side characters:

Park Namwook

At 38, Namwook is both Jaekyung's manager and the coach for Team Black. Having arranged for Dan to meet Jaekyung as his new physical therapist, he mentions to Dan he will be fine so long as he does not irritate Jaekyung. Thrilled with Jaekyung's victory in the arena, and kind to Dan, he introduces him to the other fighters at the gym as Jaekyung's personal coach. He is the one who encourages Dan's Doc nickname for others to further respect him. Having noted Jaekyung's improved demenour, Namwook praises Dan as he sees him as responsible for the development. Married where his wife is also an athlete, Namwook is father to two daughters and one son.

🚹➡️Jeong Yosep ❤️‍🩹
